products.title: Pierre Cardin | Home Fragrance Pure Rose | 50 ml
products.body_html:
Pierre Cardin Home Fragrance - Pure Rose

Pierre Cardin Home Fragrance Pure Rose brings a delightful and soothing rose scent to your home. Perfect for creating a relaxing ambiance.

Volume: 50ml

Instructions for Use:

  1. Remove the product from the box.
  2. Take off the cap and the stopper of the bottle.
  3. Insert the bamboo sticks into the bottle. The sticks will absorb the fragrance oil and begin to release a pleasant aroma into the air.
  4. Adjust the intensity of the fragrance by varying the number of sticks used. For optimal performance, we recommend turning the sticks over once a week.

Warnings:

  • Read the instructions carefully before use.
  • Keep out of reach of children.
  • Avoid use in the presence of pregnant women, infants, or individuals with respiratory conditions.
  • Keep away from food items.
  • Avoid direct inhalation and contact with skin; may cause an allergic reaction.
  • Protect from direct sunlight.

Consumer's Attention:

  • This product contains highly flammable liquid and vapor. Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames, and other ignition sources. No smoking near the diffuser.
  • Toxic to aquatic life with long-lasting effects. Handle spills promptly and avoid releasing to the environment.

In case of skin contact: Wash with plenty of soap and water.

In case of eye contact: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing.

Disposal: Dispose of contents/container in accordance with local/national regulations.

products.title: Pierre Cardin | Hair Removal Cream | 100 ml
products.body_html:
Pierre Cardin Hair Removal Cream is enriched with Chamomile and Rose Extracts, as well as Vitamin E. Designed for effective hair removal in just 3 minutes, it is suitable for sensitive skin due to its mild, lightly fragranced formula.

Volume : 100ml

Mode d'emploi :

  1. Apply an even layer of cream to the area to be depilated.
  2. Leave on for 3 minutes but do not exceed 7 minutes and do not let the cream dry on your skin.
  3. Remove the cream with a spatula or rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water.
  4. Gently dry the skin with a clean towel.

Warnings : For external use only. Do not use on irritated, damaged skin or mucous membranes. Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse immediately with plenty of water and consult a doctor. Conduct a patch test on a small skin area 24 hours before use to check for any allergic reaction. Keep out of reach of children. If irritation or discomfort persists, discontinue use and consult a doctor.

products.title: Pierre Cardin | Whitening Toothpaste | Mint | 75ml
products.body_html:
Ingredients:

Calcium carbonate helps whiten your teeth, while the mint flavor leaves a pleasant scent and ensures fresh breath. Its mineral-rich formula enhances your oral care routine.

Usage: Apply a pea-sized amount of toothpaste to the toothbrush and brush your teeth for about 2 minutes. Rinse thoroughly. Use twice a day regularly for effective results.

Warning: Keep out of reach of children. Avoid contact with eyes, and if contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with plenty of water. Store at room temperature, tightly closed, away from heat and light. Use a pea-sized amount for children aged 2 to 6 years old and supervise them while brushing and rinsing their teeth to minimize swallowing. If you consume fluoride through other means, consult a dentist or physician.

Ingredients: Calcium Carbonate, Aqua, Sorbitol, Hydrated Silica, PEG-8, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Cellulose Gum, Aroma, Phenoxyethanol, Sodium Fluoride, Sodium Saccharin, Ethylhexylglycerin.

Pierre Cardin Vitamin C Serum
Pierre Cardin Vitamin C serum brightens and evens out your skin tone while providing moisture with its Vitamin C content. Its sweet orange scent dissipates quickly. The instantly absorbed formula revitalizes your skin, leaving it refreshed.

products.title: Pierre Cardin | Peel Off Mask | Gold | 80ml
products.body_html:
GOLD PEEL-OFF MASK – MOISTURIZING

Gold Peel Off Mask - Moisturizing

Pierre Cardin Gold Peel Off Mask is enriched with Mushroom Extract, Allantoin, and Glycerin to provide deep moisturizing and rejuvenating benefits. This mask helps to hydrate, soothe, and revitalize the skin, leaving it feeling soft and glowing.

Volume: 80ml

Directions:

  1. Cleanse your face thoroughly.
  2. Apply an even layer of the mask to your face, avoiding the eye and lip areas.
  3. Allow the mask to dry completely (about 20-30 minutes).
  4. Gently peel off the mask from the edges.
  5. Rinse your face with warm water to remove any residue.

Warnings: For external use only. Avoid direct contact with eyes and lips. Store at room temperature. Keep out of reach of children.
